items.statcast_observation: Salvador Perez produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.7 mph at a 16.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 6, STL 5. Seth Lugo led the night, working 6.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 0 strikeouts and 3 walks. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.7 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Cardinals Recap
